title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: 3Blue1Brown explores the mathematical relationship between M.C. Escher's Print Gallery and complex analysis through logarithmic transformation. The video demonstrates how conformal maps and complex exponentials can reveal the hidden recursive structure in the artwork, drawing from de Smit and Lenstra's mathematical analysis.
